TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ci Wiliyem Cyefoson Kelinton , Itini i 1946 a mihecaan, saka falo a folad, saka safaw falo a romi'ad ko kahofocan ningra. manga'ay a panganganen to Piel Kelinton , O fing-kosi(pinkosi) ato sipikowan to sici no Amilika cingra, mararid cingra a malasakowan no tapang no Arkansas a kanatal, nai 1979 a mihecaan tangasa to1981 a mihecaan, nani 1983 a mihecaan tangasa to 1992 a mihecaan, malatapang sawaraan no Amilika, o saka sepat polo' ira ko tosa a rayray, nai 1993 tangasa to 2001 a mihecaan. Itini i 1975 a mihecaan, mararamod aci Hillary Kelinton, cecay ko wawa nangra to fafahiyan, ci Chelsea ko ngangan ningra. O tadakapah ho ci Kelinton, o safa ho ni Theodore Roosevelt Jr. aci John F. Kennedy, kaemang ho malatapang to cingra. kahofocan 出生 I 1946 a mihecaan saka falo a folad safaw siwa a romi'ad ko kahofocan ni Bill Kelinton, i pipaisingan a hofocen cingra, so^linay a ngangan i ci William Jefferson Blythe III, o mipacakayay ko mama ningra, i 'ayaw no kahofoc to saka tolo a folad i, masongtol no paliding a mapatay ko mama ningra. hofoc han ho ci Bill Kelinton i, sacecay sa ko ina ningra a midipot a mipalatamdaw cingraan, mafana' a minanam to samaanen a midipot sanay a tayal, hiday han no ina ningra a papidipot to akong aci amaan, o mipacakayay to maamaan cangra, itiya ho, adihayay ko mali'angay to caay ka lecad ko fanges a tamdaw, oya akong aci ama: ni Bill Kelinton i, makakanga'ay to roma a finacadan, damsay ko pinangan nangra. I 1950 a mihecaan, misawad to ko ina ni Bill Kelinton naipitilidan no kangkofo i, caay ka halafing, mararamod to aci Roger Clinton, o ina aci Roger Clinton to ko midipotay ci Bill Kelinton, safaw lima to ko mihecaan ningra i, mafalic to ko ngangan, o tadangangan ningra to ci Kelinton hananay. O kato'as ni Bill Kelinton, caay ka fangcal, o mali'angay ko padek a mama ningra, ano komaen to 'epah a malasang ko mama ningra i, miseti'ay milokesay to ina ningra, masafaya' no padek a mama ca Bill Kelinton a malakaka, safa ni Bill Kelinton ci Roger Clinton Jr. awaay ko karariting nangra a tatosa, caay kalecad ko mama nangra. palatamdaw 教育 Itini i Wonsing hananay a tokay, iraay ko Sen-ye-han Tinsokiw a kwo-syaw, Lan-po kwo-syaw ato takaraway a pitilidan, itini ci Bill Kelinton a mitilid, O cifenekay, ci tanengay mafana' cingra a mikerid to kapot, maolah cingra to kakeng ano eca, o radiw. Mikapot cingra to yofayof no pitilidan, mafana' cingra a miiyof to sa-ke-se-fong hananay a lalosidan, o saidahiay no kanatal no kakeng cingra, ciharateng cingra, manga'ay kako a malatapang nonini a yofayof saan cingra, nikaorira patiri saan cingra to niyah a tireng, sowal sa: Ya safaw enem ho ko mihecaan no mako i, ciharateng kako a mamikapot to ho-ko-ing a 'orip. Maolah kako to kakeng, fangcal ko pinangan no mako, nika, mafana' kako, caay ka lecad ci John William Coltrane anca ci Stanley Getz,a tahada'oc. Cifaloco' kako a malaising, manga'ay kako a malasafangcalay a ising, nika, mafana' kako, caay ka lecad ci Michael Debakey kako a tahada'oc. Nikaorira, mafana' kako, manga'ay kako a midama mikapot matayal to saki'alomanay a finacadan no mako. Itiya to 1963 a mihecaan, safaw pito ho ko mihecaan ni Bill Kelinton, iraay ko tosa tata'akay tadamaanay a demak, cifaloco' to cingra a mikapot to mamatayal to demak no finawlan. Saka cecay i, makaka'araway to tapang ci Johh F.Kennedy, O tay-pyaw no kapah cingra a mami'araw to loma' no tapang. Saka tosa a demak, o pakatengil ningra to kimad ni Martin Luther King Jr. ira sa ko paratoh ko kimad no mira to "iraay ko lemed no mako". Ona tosa a demak, cifaloco' to cingra a mamidemak to demak no finawlan. Pakalayap to ci Bill Kelinton to takaraway a saway no picodadan i 1968 a mihecaan, itini ho i pitilidan, malamatayalay ni hon-ko-ing ci James William Fulbright, mafanafa' a midemak mipadang to tapang ningra. I 1969 saka moetep a folad mikapot to sapipalasawad to a mala'ada, itiya to a mihedot to mowa, nikaorira, caay ka pihedot kako sanay ko sowal ningra. Marepon to ko pitilid i ta'akayay a pitilidan i, micomod to i Yale Law a pitilidan a minanam to tadamaanay a tatiliden, 1973 a mihecaan pakalayap to cingra to sarikec to Pwo-se no saway to picodad. raramod 配偶 Itini ho i Yale Law a pitilidan, mangangohah ato ci Hillary Diane Rodham, caay ka halafin mataloma mararamod cangra toya 1975 a mihecaan, cecayay to fafahiyan a wawa nangra, ci Chelsea Victoria Clinton ko ngangan no wawa nangra, itini i 1980 a mihecaan a hofocen. O 'orip to pakainiay i sici 政治生涯 Itini to i A-ken-se tata'akay a pitilidan, pasifana' ci Bill Kelinton to no rikec a rayray i, 1976 a mihecaan malatapang no A-ken-se no kitakit, o kapolongan no kicacan hananay cingra, i 1978 a mihecaan malatapang tono A-ken-se cingra, itiya yo kaemang ho o kapah ho cingra, tolo polo' ira ko tosa ko mihecaan ni Bill Kelinton itiya. Sa'ayaw ningra a malatapang no A-ken-se i, matikeda ningra ko adihayay a demak, misetek to koesitay caay ka filo ningra a kayki, nikaorira, cifaloco' cingra to nika aka ka i A-ken-se a mipatireng to nan-ming-ing hananay, caay ka kahi kaya Cong-tong ci Jimmy Carter, sanaw 'aloman ko tamdaw caay kaolah to min-cu-tang. Oya to fafahi ni Bill Clinton i, misaharaterateng, ano caay paketingen ningra ko ngangan no fa'inay ningra ci Kelinton, 'alomanay ko mapili'ay cingraan, o tada malokesay to a fafahiyan a han nangra a mapo'i ci Hillary Diane Rodhaman. tahapinangan 參考資料 == O no papotalay a kalocalay外部連結 ==
S.PHON: ʦi wiɾijəm ʦjəfo~uso~un kəɾinto~un , itini i **** a miħəʦaan, saka faɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, saka safaw faɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan niŋra. maŋaʡaj a paŋaŋanən to~u piəɾ kəɾinto~un , o~u fiŋ-ko~usi(pinko~usi) ato~u sipiko~uwan to~u siʦi no~u amiɾika ʦiŋra, marariɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra a maɾasako~uwan no~u tapaŋ no~u arkansas a kanataɾ, nai **** a miħəʦaan taŋasa to~u**** a miħəʦaan, nani **** a miħəʦaan taŋasa to~u **** a miħəʦaan, maɾatapaŋ sawaraan no~u amiɾika, o~u saka səpat po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u to~usa a rajraj, nai **** taŋasa to~u **** a miħəʦaan. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi ħiɾɾarj kəɾinto~un, ʦəʦaj ko~u wawa naŋra to~u fafaħijan, ʦi ʦħəɾsəa ko~u ŋaŋan niŋra. o~u taɬ~ɮakapaħ ħo~u ʦi kəɾinto~un, o~u safa ħo~u ni tħəo~uɬ~ɮo~urə ro~uo~usəb~vəɾt *r. aʦi *o~uħn f. kənnəɬ~ɮj, kaəmaŋ ħo~u maɾatapaŋ to~u ʦiŋra. kaħo~ufo~uʦan ** i **** a miħəʦaan saka faɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ safaw siwa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, i pipaisiŋan a ħo~ufo~uʦən ʦiŋra, so~uʔɾinaj a ŋaŋan i ʦi wiɾɾiam *əffərso~un b~b~vɾjtħə iii, o~u mipaʦakajaj ko~u mama niŋra, i ʡajaw no~u kaħo~ufo~uʦ to~u saka to~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, maso~uŋto~uɾ no~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ a mapataj ko~u mama niŋra. ħo~ufo~uʦ ħan ħo~u ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un i, saʦəʦaj sa ko~u ina niŋra a miɬ~ɮipo~ut a mipaɾatamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋraan, mafanaʡ a minanam to~u samaanən a miɬ~ɮipo~ut sanaj a tajaɾ, ħiɬ~ɮaj ħan no~u ina niŋra a papiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u ako~uŋ aʦi amaan, o~u mipaʦakajaj to~u maamaan ʦaŋra, itija ħo~u, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u maɾiʡaŋaj to~u ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u faŋəs a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja ako~uŋ aʦi ama: ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un i, makakaŋaʡaj to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ɬ~ɮamsaj ko~u pinaŋan naŋra. i **** a miħəʦaan, misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ina ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un naipitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u kaŋko~ufo~u i, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafiŋ, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u aʦi ro~u*ər ʦɾinto~un, o~u ina aʦi ro~u*ər ʦɾinto~un to~u ko~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, safaw ɾima to~u ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra i, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u ŋaŋan, o~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan niŋra to~u ʦi kəɾinto~un ħananaj. o~u kato~uʡas ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ, o~u maɾiʡaŋaj ko~u paɬ~ɮək a mama niŋra, ano~u ko~umaən to~u ʡəpaħ a maɾasaŋ ko~u mama niŋra i, misətiʡaj miɾo~ukəsaj to~u ina niŋra, masafajaʡ no~u paɬ~ɮək a mama ʦa b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un a maɾakaka, safa ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un ʦi ro~u*ər ʦɾinto~un *r. awaaj ko~u kararitiŋ naŋra a tato~usa, ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u mama naŋra. paɾatamɬ~ɮaw ** itini i wo~unsiŋ ħananaj a to~ukaj, iraaj ko~u sən-jə-ħan tinso~ukiw a kwo~u-sjaw, ɾan-po~u kwo~u-sjaw ato~u takarawaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, itini ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦifənəkaj, ʦi tanəŋaj mafanaʡ ʦiŋra a mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kapo~ut, mao~uɾaħ ʦiŋra to~u kakəŋ ano~u əʦa, o~u raɬ~ɮiw. mikapo~ut ʦiŋra to~u jo~ufajo~uf no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, mafanaʡ ʦiŋra a miijo~uf to~u sa-kə-sə-fo~uŋ ħananaj a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, o~u saiɬ~ɮaħiaj no~u kanataɾ no~u kakəŋ ʦiŋra, ʦiħaratəŋ ʦiŋra, maŋaʡaj kako~u a maɾatapaŋ no~unini a jo~ufajo~uf saan ʦiŋra, nikao~urira patiri saan ʦiŋra to~u nijaħ a tirəŋ, so~uwaɾ sa: ja safaw ənəm ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan no~u mako~u i, ʦiħaratəŋ kako~u a mamikapo~ut to~u ħo~u-ko~u-iŋ a ʡo~urip. mao~uɾaħ kako~u to~u kakəŋ, faŋʦaɾ ko~u pinaŋan no~u mako~u, nika, mafanaʡ kako~u, ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi *o~uħn wiɾɾiam ʦo~uɾtranə anʦa ʦi stanɾəj *ət*,a taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ. ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ kako~u a maɾaisiŋ, maŋaʡaj kako~u a maɾasafaŋʦaɾaj a isiŋ, nika, mafanaʡ kako~u, ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi miʦħaəɾ ɬ~ɮəb~b~vakəj kako~u a taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ. nikao~urira, mafanaʡ kako~u, maŋaʡaj kako~u a miɬ~ɮama mikapo~ut matajaɾ to~u sakiʡaɾo~umanaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u mako~u. itija to~u **** a miħəʦaan, safaw pito~u ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, iraaj ko~u to~usa tataʡakaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ʦiŋra a mikapo~ut to~u mamatajaɾ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u finawɾan. saka ʦəʦaj i, makakaʡarawaj to~u tapaŋ ʦi *o~uħħ f.kənnəɬ~ɮj, o~u taj-pjaw no~u kapaħ ʦiŋra a mamiʡaraw to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u tapaŋ. saka to~usa a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u pakatəŋiɾ niŋra to~u kimaɬ~ɮ ni martin ɾo~u~utħər kiŋ *r. ira sa ko~u parato~uħ ko~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u mira to~u "iraaj ko~u ɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u mako~u". o~una to~usa a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ʦiŋra a mamiɬ~ɮəmak to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u finawɾan. pakaɾajap to~u ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un to~u takarawaj a sawaj no~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i **** a miħəʦaan, itini ħo~u i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, maɾamatajaɾaj ni ħo~un-ko~u-iŋ ʦi *aməs wiɾɾiam fo~u~uɾb~b~vri*ħt, mafanafaʡ a miɬ~ɮəmak mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u tapaŋ niŋra. i **** saka mo~uətəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mikapo~ut to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u a maɾaʡaɬ~ɮa, itija to~u a miħəɬ~ɮo~ut to~u mo~uwa, nikao~urira, ʦaaj ka piħəɬ~ɮo~ut kako~u sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ niŋra. marəpo~un to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i taʡakajaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u i jaɾə ɾaw a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a minanam to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a tatiɾiɬ~ɮən, **** a miħəʦaan pakaɾajap to~u ʦiŋra to~u sarikəʦ to~u pwo~u-sə no~u sawaj to~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. raramo~uɬ~ɮ ** itini ħo~u i jaɾə ɾaw a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, maŋaŋo~uħaħ ato~u ʦi ħiɾɾarj ɬ~ɮianə ro~uɬ~ɮħam, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin mataɾo~uma mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra to~uja **** a miħəʦaan, ʦəʦajaj to~u fafaħijan a wawa naŋra, ʦi ʦħəɾsəa b~viʦto~uria ʦɾinto~un ko~u ŋaŋan no~u wawa naŋra, itini i **** a miħəʦaan a ħo~ufo~uʦən. o~u ʡo~urip to~u pakainiaj i siʦi **** itini to~u i a-kən-sə tataʡakaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, pasifanaʡ ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un to~u no~u rikəʦ a rajraj i, **** a miħəʦaan maɾatapaŋ no~u a-kən-sə no~u kitakit, o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u kiʦaʦan ħananaj ʦiŋra, i **** a miħəʦaan maɾatapaŋ to~uno~u a-kən-sə ʦiŋra, itija jo~u kaəmaŋ ħo~u o~u kapaħ ħo~u ʦiŋra, to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u to~usa ko~u miħəʦaan ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un itija. saʡajaw niŋra a maɾatapaŋ no~u a-kən-sə i, matikəɬ~ɮa niŋra ko~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, misətək to~u ko~uəsitaj ʦaaj ka fiɾo~u niŋra a kajki, nikao~urira, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦiŋra to~u nika aka ka i a-kən-sə a mipatirəŋ to~u nan-miŋ-iŋ ħananaj, ʦaaj ka kaħi kaja ʦo~uŋ-to~uŋ ʦi *immj ʦartər, sanaw ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj kao~uɾaħ to~u min-ʦo~u~u-taŋ. o~uja to~u fafaħi ni b~b~viɾɾ ʦɾinto~un i, misaħaratəratəŋ, ano~u ʦaaj pakətiŋən niŋra ko~u ŋaŋan no~u faʡinaj niŋra ʦi kəɾinto~un, ʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u mapiɾiʡaj ʦiŋraan, o~u taɬ~ɮa maɾo~ukəsaj to~u a fafaħijan a ħan naŋra a mapo~uʡi ʦi ħiɾɾarj ɬ~ɮianə ro~uɬ~ɮħaman. taħapinaŋan **** == o~u no~u papo~utaɾaj a kaɾo~uʦaɾaj**** ==
S.FORM: Ci Wiliyem Cyefoson Kelinton , Itini i 1946 a mihecaan, saka falo a folad, saka safaw falo a romi'ad ko kahofocan ningra. manga'ay a panganganen to Piel Kelinton , O fing-kosi(pinkosi) ato sipikowan to sici no Amilika cingra, mararid cingra a malasakowan no tapang no Arkansas a kanatal, nai 1979 a mihecaan tangasa to1981 a mihecaan, nani 1983 a mihecaan tangasa to 1992 a mihecaan, malatapang sawaraan no Amilika, o saka sepat polo' ira ko tosa a rayray, nai 1993 tangasa to 2001 a mihecaan. Itini i 1975 a mihecaan, mararamod aci Hillary Kelinton, cecay ko wawa nangra to fafahiyan, ci Chelsea ko ngangan ningra. O tadakapah ho ci Kelinton, o safa ho ni Theodore Roosevelt Jr. aci John F. Kennedy, kaemang ho malatapang to cingra. kahofocan 出生 I 1946 a mihecaan saka falo a folad safaw siwa a romi'ad ko kahofocan ni Bill Kelinton, i pipaisingan a hofocen cingra, so^linay a ngangan i ci William Jefferson Blythe III, o mipacakayay ko mama ningra, i 'ayaw no kahofoc to saka tolo a folad i, masongtol no paliding a mapatay ko mama ningra. hofoc han ho ci Bill Kelinton i, sacecay sa ko ina ningra a midipot a mipalatamdaw cingraan, mafana' a minanam to samaanen a midipot sanay a tayal, hiday han no ina ningra a papidipot to akong aci amaan, o mipacakayay to maamaan cangra, itiya ho, adihayay ko mali'angay to caay ka lecad ko fanges a tamdaw, oya akong aci ama: ni Bill Kelinton i, makakanga'ay to roma a finacadan, damsay ko pinangan nangra. I 1950 a mihecaan, misawad to ko ina ni Bill Kelinton naipitilidan no kangkofo i, caay ka halafing, mararamod to aci Roger Clinton, o ina aci Roger Clinton to ko midipotay ci Bill Kelinton, safaw lima to ko mihecaan ningra i, mafalic to ko ngangan, o tadangangan ningra to ci Kelinton hananay. O kato'as ni Bill Kelinton, caay ka fangcal, o mali'angay ko padek a mama ningra, ano komaen to 'epah a malasang ko mama ningra i, miseti'ay milokesay to ina ningra, masafaya' no padek a mama ca Bill Kelinton a malakaka, safa ni Bill Kelinton ci Roger Clinton Jr. awaay ko karariting nangra a tatosa, caay kalecad ko mama nangra. palatamdaw 教育 Itini i Wonsing hananay a tokay, iraay ko Sen-ye-han Tinsokiw a kwo-syaw, Lan-po kwo-syaw ato takaraway a pitilidan, itini ci Bill Kelinton a mitilid, O cifenekay, ci tanengay mafana' cingra a mikerid to kapot, maolah cingra to kakeng ano eca, o radiw. Mikapot cingra to yofayof no pitilidan, mafana' cingra a miiyof to sa-ke-se-fong hananay a lalosidan, o saidahiay no kanatal no kakeng cingra, ciharateng cingra, manga'ay kako a malatapang nonini a yofayof saan cingra, nikaorira patiri saan cingra to niyah a tireng, sowal sa: Ya safaw enem ho ko mihecaan no mako i, ciharateng kako a mamikapot to ho-ko-ing a 'orip. Maolah kako to kakeng, fangcal ko pinangan no mako, nika, mafana' kako, caay ka lecad ci John William Coltrane anca ci Stanley Getz,a tahada'oc. Cifaloco' kako a malaising, manga'ay kako a malasafangcalay a ising, nika, mafana' kako, caay ka lecad ci Michael Debakey kako a tahada'oc. Nikaorira, mafana' kako, manga'ay kako a midama mikapot matayal to saki'alomanay a finacadan no mako. Itiya to 1963 a mihecaan, safaw pito ho ko mihecaan ni Bill Kelinton, iraay ko tosa tata'akay tadamaanay a demak, cifaloco' to cingra a mikapot to mamatayal to demak no finawlan. Saka cecay i, makaka'araway to tapang ci Johh F.Kennedy, O tay-pyaw no kapah cingra a mami'araw to loma' no tapang. Saka tosa a demak, o pakatengil ningra to kimad ni Martin Luther King Jr. ira sa ko paratoh ko kimad no mira to "iraay ko lemed no mako". Ona tosa a demak, cifaloco' to cingra a mamidemak to demak no finawlan. Pakalayap to ci Bill Kelinton to takaraway a saway no picodadan i 1968 a mihecaan, itini ho i pitilidan, malamatayalay ni hon-ko-ing ci James William Fulbright, mafanafa' a midemak mipadang to tapang ningra. I 1969 saka moetep a folad mikapot to sapipalasawad to a mala'ada, itiya to a mihedot to mowa, nikaorira, caay ka pihedot kako sanay ko sowal ningra. Marepon to ko pitilid i ta'akayay a pitilidan i, micomod to i Yale Law a pitilidan a minanam to tadamaanay a tatiliden, 1973 a mihecaan pakalayap to cingra to sarikec to Pwo-se no saway to picodad. raramod 配偶 Itini ho i Yale Law a pitilidan, mangangohah ato ci Hillary Diane Rodham, caay ka halafin mataloma mararamod cangra toya 1975 a mihecaan, cecayay to fafahiyan a wawa nangra, ci Chelsea Victoria Clinton ko ngangan no wawa nangra, itini i 1980 a mihecaan a hofocen. O 'orip to pakainiay i sici 政治生涯 Itini to i A-ken-se tata'akay a pitilidan, pasifana' ci Bill Kelinton to no rikec a rayray i, 1976 a mihecaan malatapang no A-ken-se no kitakit, o kapolongan no kicacan hananay cingra, i 1978 a mihecaan malatapang tono A-ken-se cingra, itiya yo kaemang ho o kapah ho cingra, tolo polo' ira ko tosa ko mihecaan ni Bill Kelinton itiya. Sa'ayaw ningra a malatapang no A-ken-se i, matikeda ningra ko adihayay a demak, misetek to koesitay caay ka filo ningra a kayki, nikaorira, cifaloco' cingra to nika aka ka i A-ken-se a mipatireng to nan-ming-ing hananay, caay ka kahi kaya Cong-tong ci Jimmy Carter, sanaw 'aloman ko tamdaw caay kaolah to min-cu-tang. Oya to fafahi ni Bill Clinton i, misaharaterateng, ano caay paketingen ningra ko ngangan no fa'inay ningra ci Kelinton, 'alomanay ko mapili'ay cingraan, o tada malokesay to a fafahiyan a han nangra a mapo'i ci Hillary Diane Rodhaman. tahapinangan 參考資料 == O no papotalay a kalocalay外部連結 ==
S.PHON: ʦi wiɾijəm ʦjəfo~uso~un kəɾinto~un , itini i **** a miħəʦaan, saka faɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, saka safaw faɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan niŋra. maŋaʡaj a paŋaŋanən to~u piəɾ kəɾinto~un , o~u fiŋ-ko~usi(pinko~usi) ato~u sipiko~uwan to~u siʦi no~u amiɾika ʦiŋra, marariɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra a maɾasako~uwan no~u tapaŋ no~u arkansas a kanataɾ, nai **** a miħəʦaan taŋasa to~u**** a miħəʦaan, nani **** a miħəʦaan taŋasa to~u **** a miħəʦaan, maɾatapaŋ sawaraan no~u amiɾika, o~u saka səpat po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u to~usa a rajraj, nai **** taŋasa to~u **** a miħəʦaan. itini i **** a miħəʦaan, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi ħiɾɾarj kəɾinto~un, ʦəʦaj ko~u wawa naŋra to~u fafaħijan, ʦi ʦħəɾsəa ko~u ŋaŋan niŋra. o~u taɬ~ɮakapaħ ħo~u ʦi kəɾinto~un, o~u safa ħo~u ni tħəo~uɬ~ɮo~urə ro~uo~usəb~vəɾt *r. aʦi *o~uħn f. kənnəɬ~ɮj, kaəmaŋ ħo~u maɾatapaŋ to~u ʦiŋra. kaħo~ufo~uʦan ** i **** a miħəʦaan saka faɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ safaw siwa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, i pipaisiŋan a ħo~ufo~uʦən ʦiŋra, so~uʔɾinaj a ŋaŋan i ʦi wiɾɾiam *əffərso~un b~b~vɾjtħə iii, o~u mipaʦakajaj ko~u mama niŋra, i ʡajaw no~u kaħo~ufo~uʦ to~u saka to~uɾo~u a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, maso~uŋto~uɾ no~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ a mapataj ko~u mama niŋra. ħo~ufo~uʦ ħan ħo~u ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un i, saʦəʦaj sa ko~u ina niŋra a miɬ~ɮipo~ut a mipaɾatamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋraan, mafanaʡ a minanam to~u samaanən a miɬ~ɮipo~ut sanaj a tajaɾ, ħiɬ~ɮaj ħan no~u ina niŋra a papiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u ako~uŋ aʦi amaan, o~u mipaʦakajaj to~u maamaan ʦaŋra, itija ħo~u, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u maɾiʡaŋaj to~u ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u faŋəs a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja ako~uŋ aʦi ama: ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un i, makakaŋaʡaj to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ɬ~ɮamsaj ko~u pinaŋan naŋra. i **** a miħəʦaan, misawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ina ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un naipitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u kaŋko~ufo~u i, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafiŋ, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u aʦi ro~u*ər ʦɾinto~un, o~u ina aʦi ro~u*ər ʦɾinto~un to~u ko~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, safaw ɾima to~u ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra i, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u ŋaŋan, o~u taɬ~ɮaŋaŋan niŋra to~u ʦi kəɾinto~un ħananaj. o~u kato~uʡas ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ, o~u maɾiʡaŋaj ko~u paɬ~ɮək a mama niŋra, ano~u ko~umaən to~u ʡəpaħ a maɾasaŋ ko~u mama niŋra i, misətiʡaj miɾo~ukəsaj to~u ina niŋra, masafajaʡ no~u paɬ~ɮək a mama ʦa b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un a maɾakaka, safa ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un ʦi ro~u*ər ʦɾinto~un *r. awaaj ko~u kararitiŋ naŋra a tato~usa, ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u mama naŋra. paɾatamɬ~ɮaw ** itini i wo~unsiŋ ħananaj a to~ukaj, iraaj ko~u sən-jə-ħan tinso~ukiw a kwo~u-sjaw, ɾan-po~u kwo~u-sjaw ato~u takarawaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, itini ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦifənəkaj, ʦi tanəŋaj mafanaʡ ʦiŋra a mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kapo~ut, mao~uɾaħ ʦiŋra to~u kakəŋ ano~u əʦa, o~u raɬ~ɮiw. mikapo~ut ʦiŋra to~u jo~ufajo~uf no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, mafanaʡ ʦiŋra a miijo~uf to~u sa-kə-sə-fo~uŋ ħananaj a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, o~u saiɬ~ɮaħiaj no~u kanataɾ no~u kakəŋ ʦiŋra, ʦiħaratəŋ ʦiŋra, maŋaʡaj kako~u a maɾatapaŋ no~unini a jo~ufajo~uf saan ʦiŋra, nikao~urira patiri saan ʦiŋra to~u nijaħ a tirəŋ, so~uwaɾ sa: ja safaw ənəm ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan no~u mako~u i, ʦiħaratəŋ kako~u a mamikapo~ut to~u ħo~u-ko~u-iŋ a ʡo~urip. mao~uɾaħ kako~u to~u kakəŋ, faŋʦaɾ ko~u pinaŋan no~u mako~u, nika, mafanaʡ kako~u, ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi *o~uħn wiɾɾiam ʦo~uɾtranə anʦa ʦi stanɾəj *ət*,a taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ. ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ kako~u a maɾaisiŋ, maŋaʡaj kako~u a maɾasafaŋʦaɾaj a isiŋ, nika, mafanaʡ kako~u, ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi miʦħaəɾ ɬ~ɮəb~b~vakəj kako~u a taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ. nikao~urira, mafanaʡ kako~u, maŋaʡaj kako~u a miɬ~ɮama mikapo~ut matajaɾ to~u sakiʡaɾo~umanaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u mako~u. itija to~u **** a miħəʦaan, safaw pito~u ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un, iraaj ko~u to~usa tataʡakaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ʦiŋra a mikapo~ut to~u mamatajaɾ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u finawɾan. saka ʦəʦaj i, makakaʡarawaj to~u tapaŋ ʦi *o~uħħ f.kənnəɬ~ɮj, o~u taj-pjaw no~u kapaħ ʦiŋra a mamiʡaraw to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u tapaŋ. saka to~usa a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u pakatəŋiɾ niŋra to~u kimaɬ~ɮ ni martin ɾo~u~utħər kiŋ *r. ira sa ko~u parato~uħ ko~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u mira to~u "iraaj ko~u ɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u mako~u". o~una to~usa a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ʦiŋra a mamiɬ~ɮəmak to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u finawɾan. pakaɾajap to~u ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un to~u takarawaj a sawaj no~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i **** a miħəʦaan, itini ħo~u i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, maɾamatajaɾaj ni ħo~un-ko~u-iŋ ʦi *aməs wiɾɾiam fo~u~uɾb~b~vri*ħt, mafanafaʡ a miɬ~ɮəmak mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u tapaŋ niŋra. i **** saka mo~uətəp a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mikapo~ut to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u a maɾaʡaɬ~ɮa, itija to~u a miħəɬ~ɮo~ut to~u mo~uwa, nikao~urira, ʦaaj ka piħəɬ~ɮo~ut kako~u sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ niŋra. marəpo~un to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i taʡakajaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u i jaɾə ɾaw a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a minanam to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a tatiɾiɬ~ɮən, **** a miħəʦaan pakaɾajap to~u ʦiŋra to~u sarikəʦ to~u pwo~u-sə no~u sawaj to~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. raramo~uɬ~ɮ ** itini ħo~u i jaɾə ɾaw a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, maŋaŋo~uħaħ ato~u ʦi ħiɾɾarj ɬ~ɮianə ro~uɬ~ɮħam, ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin mataɾo~uma mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra to~uja **** a miħəʦaan, ʦəʦajaj to~u fafaħijan a wawa naŋra, ʦi ʦħəɾsəa b~viʦto~uria ʦɾinto~un ko~u ŋaŋan no~u wawa naŋra, itini i **** a miħəʦaan a ħo~ufo~uʦən. o~u ʡo~urip to~u pakainiaj i siʦi **** itini to~u i a-kən-sə tataʡakaj a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, pasifanaʡ ʦi b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un to~u no~u rikəʦ a rajraj i, **** a miħəʦaan maɾatapaŋ no~u a-kən-sə no~u kitakit, o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u kiʦaʦan ħananaj ʦiŋra, i **** a miħəʦaan maɾatapaŋ to~uno~u a-kən-sə ʦiŋra, itija jo~u kaəmaŋ ħo~u o~u kapaħ ħo~u ʦiŋra, to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ ira ko~u to~usa ko~u miħəʦaan ni b~b~viɾɾ kəɾinto~un itija. saʡajaw niŋra a maɾatapaŋ no~u a-kən-sə i, matikəɬ~ɮa niŋra ko~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, misətək to~u ko~uəsitaj ʦaaj ka fiɾo~u niŋra a kajki, nikao~urira, ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦiŋra to~u nika aka ka i a-kən-sə a mipatirəŋ to~u nan-miŋ-iŋ ħananaj, ʦaaj ka kaħi kaja ʦo~uŋ-to~uŋ ʦi *immj ʦartər, sanaw ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj kao~uɾaħ to~u min-ʦo~u~u-taŋ. o~uja to~u fafaħi ni b~b~viɾɾ ʦɾinto~un i, misaħaratəratəŋ, ano~u ʦaaj pakətiŋən niŋra ko~u ŋaŋan no~u faʡinaj niŋra ʦi kəɾinto~un, ʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u mapiɾiʡaj ʦiŋraan, o~u taɬ~ɮa maɾo~ukəsaj to~u a fafaħijan a ħan naŋra a mapo~uʡi ʦi ħiɾɾarj ɬ~ɮianə ro~uɬ~ɮħaman. taħapinaŋan **** == o~u no~u papo~utaɾaj a kaɾo~uʦaɾaj**** ==
